summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CodeVerse Institute website. Backend APIs working well with minor issues. Critical frontend bug preventing public pages from loading due to React Helmet implementation error.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful project creation
minor_bugs.impact: Functional but incorrect HTTP status code

working_endpoints: /api/inquiry - Successfully accepts and processes inquiry form submissions
/api/dashboard/stats - Returns correct project and view counts
/api/projects/{slug} - Project detail retrieval with view increment working
/api/projects/{id} - Project update and delete operations working

critical_bugs.issue: React Helmet error: 'Helmet expects a string as a child of <title>. Did you forget to wrap your children in braces?'
critical_bugs.impact: Public student profile and project detail pages completely broken - showing blank screen

working_features.status: Fully functional - hero section, course cards, gallery, testimonials all working
Successfully submits and shows success message
Google OAuth button present and functional
Loads correctly with user stats, project cards, and navigation
Form fills and submits successfully, creates projects in backend

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, stats, courses, gallery, testimonials, contact)
Inquiry form submission works correctly with success feedback
Google OAuth login button redirects properly
Dashboard displays user stats and projects when authenticated
Project upload form creates projects successfully
Backend APIs for all CRUD operations working
Navigation between authenticated and public sections works
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix React Helmet implementation in StudentProfile.jsx and ProjectDetail.jsx components. The error 'Helmet expects a string as a child of <title>' suggests the title prop is not properly wrapped in braces. This is blocking all public profile and project detail pages from loading.

success_percentage.backend: 90% - All major functionality working, minor status code issue
success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Landing page and dashboard working, but public pages completely broken due to Helmet error
